zh.Felsham, , Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬
zh.Felsham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可費爾申馬
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Goodrich於1487年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬時，他的父親John Goodrich32歲，母親Isabel27歲。他於大約1510年與Johanna Addy在英國英格蘭素福爾可費爾申馬結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年10月在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可費爾申馬。

zh-hans.Felsham, , Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬
zh-hans.Felsham, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可費爾申馬
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Goodrich于1487年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬时，他的父亲John Goodrich32岁，母亲Isabel27岁。他于大约1510年与Johanna Addy在英国英格兰素福爾可費爾申馬结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年10月在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可費爾申馬。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When John Goodrich was born in 1487, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Goodrich, was 32 and his mother, Isabel, was 27. He married Johanna Addy about 1510, in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in October 1558, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Felsham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Goodrich est né en 1487, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Goodrich, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Addy environ 1510, à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1558, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Felsham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Goodrich 1487 in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Goodrich 32 und seine Mutter Isabel 27. Er hat um 1510 in Felsham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Johanna Addy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1558 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Felsham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich è nato il nel 1487 nel Felsham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Goodrich, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Addy circa 1510, nel Felsham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1558, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Felsham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Felsham, , Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャム
ja.Felsham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクフエルシャム
ja.lifeSummary: John Goodrichが1487年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャムで生まれた時，父John Goodrichは32歳，母Isabelは27歳であった。約1510年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフエルシャムでJohanna Addyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年10月に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクフエルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Goodrich(이)가 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Goodrich(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프샤에서 Johanna Addy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 10월 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 프샤에 묻혔다.

mn.Felsham, , Suffolk, England: Felsham, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Goodrich nasceu em 1487, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Goodrich, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Addy aproximadamente 1510, em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1558, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Goodrich родился в 1487 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Goodrich было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Addy около 1510 г. в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1558 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности фелшам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Goodrich nació en 1487, en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Goodrich, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Johanna Addy aproximadamente 1510, en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1558, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Felsham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
